title: Chrome Sodium EXTREME
description:
WARNING!
This is not Chrome Sodium! This is made to squeeze every little frame out of Minecraft possible!
body:
# Chrome Sodium EXTREME



## !WARNING! ⚠️
This is not base Chrome Sodium! If you are looking for Chrome Sodium, Please look at this [link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/chrome-sodium)

## What does it do?🔥
Chrome Sodium Extreme is an official fork from the Creator of [Chrome Sodium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/chrome-sodium), It does evrything Chrome Sodium Optimizes but it sacrifices everything for max frames possible, many features from Chrome Sodium may not be present

## Why Extreme? 🔥
You got that old weak laptop that wasn't intended for gaming? Extreme has your back, make your Minecraft actually playable!
